parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename (without path) of the GEDCOM file on the webtrees server to convert.

parameters.name: filename_converted
parameters.description: The filename (without path) of the converted GEDCOM file on the webtrees server.

parameters.name: file_format
parameters.description: The format of the exported file. Defautls to "gedcom".

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: The character encoding of the GEDCOM file. Defaults to UTF-8.

parameters.name: line_endings
parameters.description: The line endings of the GEDCOM file. Defaults to CRLF.

parameters.name: time_stamp
parameters.description: The type of time stamp, which is added to the filename of an exported GEDCOM file. Defaults to "none".

parameters.name: gedcom_filter1
parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

get.description: Export a tree as a GEDCOM file.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the file into which the GEDCOM is exported. Defaults to the tree name.

parameters.name: export_clippings_cart
parameters.description: Whether to export the clippings cart (instead of the entire tree). Defaults to "false".

parameters.name: export_action
parameters.description: The action to perform when exporting a tree from webtrees. Defaults to "download".

parameters.name: file_format
parameters.description: The format of the exported file. Defautls to "gedcom".

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: The character encoding of the GEDCOM file. Defaults to UTF-8.

parameters.name: line_endings
parameters.description: The line endings of the GEDCOM file. Defaults to CRLF.

parameters.name: privacy
parameters.description: The privacy level for the exported GEDCOM file. Defaults to "none".

parameters.name: time_stamp
parameters.description: The type of time stamp, which is added to the filename of an exported GEDCOM file. Defaults to "none".

parameters.name: gedcom_filter1
parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

parameters.name: gedcom_filter2
parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

parameters.name: gedcom_filter3
parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

parameters.name: gedbas_api_key
parameters.description: GEDBAS API key, which allows to upload GEDCOM files for a certain GEDBAS account. Will default to a value in the module settings of Extended Import/Export if it has been stored before.

parameters.name: gedbas_id
parameters.description: The ID of the GEDBAS database, to which the GEDCOM file shall be uploaded or which shall be created. Will default to a value in the module settings of Extended Import/Export if it has been stored before.

parameters.name: gedbas_title
parameters.description: The title of the GEDBAS database. By default, the GEDBAS database title is generated from the tree title. Will default to a value in the module settings of Extended Import/Export if it has been stored before.

parameters.name: gedbas_description
parameters.description: The description of the GEDBAS database. By default, the GEDBAS database description is generated from HEAD:NOTE or from the tree title. Will default to a value in the module settings of Extended Import/Export if it has been stored before.

400.description: Bad request: Validation of input parameters failed.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing authorization header or bearer token.

404.description: Not found: Tree does not exist.

get.description: Retrieve the GEDCOM data for a record.

parameters.name: xref
parameters.description: The XREF (i.e. GEDOM cross-reference identifier) of the record to retrieve.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The format of the GEDCOM data. Possible values are "gedcom" (GEDCOM 5.5.1), "gedcom-record" (single GEDCOM 5.5.1 record) "gedcom-x" (default; a JSON GEDCOM format defined by Familysearch), and "json" (identical to gedcom-x).

200.description: The GEDCOM data of a record in webtrees

schema.description: The GEDCOM 5.5.1 data of a record in webtrees
schema.example:
0 @X1234@ INDI
1 NAME John /Doe/
1 BIRT
2 DATE 19 FEB 1870

schema.description: The GEDCOM-X data of a record in webtrees

400.description: Bad request: Validation of input parameters failed.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing authorization header or bearer token.

404.description: Not found: Tree does not exist, or no matching GEDCOM record found for XREF.

post.description: Import a tree from a GEDCOM file in the data folder on the webtrees server.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename (without path) of the GEDCOM file on the webtrees server to import.

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: The character encoding of the GEDCOM file. Defaults to "UTF-8".

parameters.name: keep_media
parameters.description: Whether to keep existing media objects in the tree. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: word_wrapped_notes
parameters.description: Whether to wrap notes at word boundaries. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: gedcom_media_path
parameters.description: The path to GEDCOM media files on the webtrees server. If empty, the default media path is used.

parameters.name: gedcom_filter1
parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

parameters.name: gedcom_filter2
parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

parameters.name: gedcom_filter3
parameters.description: A GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing authorization header or bearer token.

404.description: Not found: Tree does not exist, or no matching GEDCOM record found for XREF.

put.description: Modify the GEDCOM data of a record.

parameters.name: xref
parameters.description: The XREF (i.e. GEDOM cross-reference identifier) of the record to modify.

parameters.name: gedcom
parameters.description: The GEDCOM text, which shall be added to the newly created record. The GEDCOM text must not contain a level 0 line, because it is created automatically. "\n" or "%OA" will be detected as line break.

400.description: Bad request: Validation of input parameters failed.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing authorization header or bearer token.

get.description: Perform a general search in webtrees.

parameters.name: tree
parameters.description: The name of the tree. If not provided, all trees will be searched.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query.

parameters.name: search_individuals
parameters.description: Whether to search in individuals.

parameters.name: search_families
parameters.description: Whether to search in families.

parameters.name: search_locations
parameters.description: Whether to search in locations.

parameters.name: search_repositories
parameters.description: Whether to search in repositories.

parameters.name: search_sources
parameters.description: Whether to search in sources.

parameters.name: search_notes
parameters.description: Whether to search in notes.

200.description: The result of a general search in webtrees. The result contains a list of records, each with the tree name and the XREF of the record.

400.description: Bad request: Validation of input parameters failed.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing authorization header or bearer token.

404.description: Not found: Tree does not exist.

ExportAction.description: The action to perform when exporting a tree from webtrees

ExportEncoding.title: export_encoding
ExportEncoding.description: The character encoding of a GEDCOM file

FileFormat.title: file_format
FileFormat.description: The file format for an export from webtrees

FileName.title: filename
FileName.description: A filename (without path) that is used for a webtrees tree

GedcomFilter.title: gedcom_filter
GedcomFilter.description: The name of a GEDCOM filter used by the Extended Import/Export custom module to filter GEDCOM data during import and export.

ImportEncoding.title: import_encoding
ImportEncoding.description: The character encoding of a GEDCOM file

LineEndings.title: line_endings
LineEndings.description: The line endings for a GEDCOM file

Privacy.title: privacy
Privacy.description: The privacy level for an export from webtrees

TimeStamp.title: timestamp
TimeStamp.description: The type of time stamp, which is added to the filename of an exported GEDCOM file

TreeItem.title: TreeItem
TreeItem.description: A tree item with id, name, title, media directory, and imported status

media_directory.description: The media directory of the tree

imported.description: Whether the tree has already been imported

WebtreesSearchResultItem.title: WebtreesSearchResultItem
WebtreesSearchResultItem.description: Search result item with tree name and xref

tree.description: The name of the tree, to which the record belongs

xref.description: The XREF (i.e. GEDOM cross-reference identifier) of the record

gedcom.name: gedcom
gedcom.description: The GEDCOM text, which shall be added to the newly created record. The GEDCOM text must not contain a level 0 line, because it is created automatically. "\n" or "%OA" will be detected as line break.

note.name: note
note.description: Text of a note. In case of a NOTE record, the note text will be added after the level 0 NOTE tag. For all other record types, the text will be added as a level 1 NOTE structure.

tree.name: tree
tree.description: The name (i.e. filename) of a webtrees tree.
